headline: See yourself clearly. Every session.
subhead: Monthly at $24.99. Annual pricing planned at $239.88/year (about $19.99/month).

singleTier.name: Meridian
features: Real-time psychological stability index — refreshes in under 100ms after every fill so you see pressure in the moment, not only in hindsight
Seven independent behavioral signals that combine into one composite score you can read at a glance
Baselines calibrated from your own history — not one-size-fits-all thresholds
Native NinjaTrader 8 — live readout while you trade, plus a hub for session detail, history, and settings
100% local — no cloud uploads, no accounts, no telemetry; your data stays on your PC
Cancel any time — monthly billing, no long-term lock-in

annualPreview.name: Annual
features: Good fit for traders who want baseline history to build over time

footnote: Monthly subscriptions are billed at $24.99 USD after the 7-day free trial. Planned annual pricing is $239.88/year (about $19.99/month), subject to checkout availability. Cancel any time before the trial ends and you will not be charged. Trading involves substantial risk of loss. Meridian does not provide trading signals or investment advice. Results may vary.
